title: Plan with Claude Opus, Build with Kimi K2.6? LIVE Mixed-Provider Benchmark
summary: Cole Medin benchmarks mixed-provider LLM workflows by pairing Claude Opus and Kimi K2.6 in different planning and implementation roles across three real GitHub issues. An Archon-based benchmark matrix tests four configurations and scores the resulting 12 PRs on seven quality dimensions using Opus as evaluator, answering which provider pairing is optimal for planning versus implementation.
